label: Genesis
description: Satoshi's earliest tagged release — 26 source files, no directories

label: Satoshi's Last
description: Last release of the Satoshi era — src/ directory appears

label: LevelDB
description: BerkeleyDB → LevelDB migration, the accidental hard fork

label: Bitcoin Core
description: Rebranded to 'Bitcoin Core' — major refactoring begins

label: SegWit
description: Segregated Witness code included — the code people fought over

label: Post-War
description: Full SegWit wallet support — the blocksize war is over

label: Taproot
description: Taproot activation — last major consensus change

label: Kernel
description: libbitcoinkernel begins — separating consensus from the node
